items.title: Umi no Soko
items.synopsis: Living in a seaside village, Wakashio is secretly in love with Yakaze, a member of the forest tribe. As the youngest son of the chieftain, Wakashio is living a difficult life, and spending time with Yakaze is the only solace he can find. However, when his brother discovers their relationship, Yakaze is killed. Just when Wakashio sinks into despair, Yakaze returns in a different form. With pale skin and red eyes, he may look like a monster, but his heart remains unchanged. The two still love each other as they once did, and begin to search for a way to live together. Ghosts, xenomorphs, tentacles, switching... A tale of lovers whom death does not part that takes us from the chaotic depths of the sea where histories and cultures intertwine, to a brighter place.

items.title: Sono Akuyaku Kizoku, Mama Heroine ga Suki Sugiru ~Shinshi na Doryoku de Saikyou to Nari Fuguu na Oshi Chara Tasukemakuru~
alt_titles: その悪役貴族、ママヒロインが好きすぎる～真摯な努力で最強となり不遇な推しキャラ助けまくる～
The Villainous Aristocrat Loves Mom Heroines Too Much: Becoming The Strongest with Sincere Effort to Save Misfortunate Fave Chars
That Villainous Aristocrat Loves Mama Heroine Too Much.
Ngài Quý Tộc Phản Diện Yêu Các Bà Mẹ Nữ Chính Quá Mức: Trở Nên Mạnh Nhất Bằng Nỗ Lực Chân Thành Để Cứu Các Nhân Vật Yêu Thích Bị Bất Hạnh.
O aristocrata vilão ama demais as mães heroínas: Tornando-se a mais forte com um esforço sincero para salvar personagens favoritos desafortunados
Ce noble méchant qui adore trop les mères des héroïnes-grâce à ses efforts, il devient invincible pour protéger ses personnages favoris!
That Villainous Aristocrat Is Actually Crazy About Mom Heroines ~With His Earnest Hard Work, He Becomes the Strongest and Saves All of His Favorite Characters~
items.synopsis:
The mom characters who appear in the game *MamaFan* are all unfortunate sub-heroines who always get bad ending routes. 

"Why... Why do such cute moms have to die?!"

Even though the protagonist tried very hard to request a route where they get saved, all of his efforts were in vain, making him spend his days in frustration. Then on a certain day, he suddenly gets reincarnated into the world of *MamaFan*... However, he gets reincarnated as a villainous aristocrat who's got nothing but the worst routes.
___
**Additional Links:**
- Alt Official Raw: [niconico Manga](https://manga.nicovideo.jp/comic/71300)
- [Official X/Twitter Account](https://x.com/oominemanga)

items.title: Sono Toki Heart wa Nusumareta
alt_titles: その時ハートは盗まれた
items.synopsis: Life is good as the son of an aristocrat. All the money and free time offers everything one could want: elegant accommodations, fine clothing, sumptuous food and drink, smashing parties and as many sexual partners as you can count. But for one particular upper-crust snob, priorities are about to change. When a forthright and noble thief comes a-calling, he leaves behind an irresistible air of mystery. Could it be he's truly the thief of hearts, who wears a mask to hide his desires?

items.title: Solo Camping for Two
alt_titles: Dã Ngoại Một Mình Cùng Nhau
items.synopsis:
Kinokura Gen loves camping solo. He enjoys the quiet solitude away from the hustle and bustle of the city, and being able to appreciate nature all by himself. But on one camping trip, his solitude is broken by the appearance of Kusano Shizuku, a young woman who wanted to go solo camping by herself, but is ill-prepared and completely out of her league. While he tries to to get her to go home so he can camp in peace, she refuses, and stubbornly insists on accompanying him on future camping trips until she's ready to camp solo.
___
**Note**: "Part 1" concluded in February 2023 with 3 extra chapters due to start in April as the series is moving magazines from Kodansha Evening to Kodansha Morning.

The series resumed its publication in December 2023.

items.title: Yuari Shisou na Koi dakara
alt_titles: 湯あたりしそうな恋だから
items.synopsis: - Sono te (w)o Toretanara (If You Grasp That Hand)

items.title: Rihito Sajou's Father and The Subordinate
alt_titles: Sajou Rihito no Chichi to Sono Buka
Ba Sajou Rihito và Cậu Cấp Dưới
佐条利人の父とその部下
items.synopsis: Doukyuusei series latest spin-off, Futari Gurashi's continuation mainly focuses on Sajou's father and his subordinate relationship.

items.title: Sono Ossan, Isekai de Nishuume Play wo Mankitsu Chuu
alt_titles: Sono Ossan, Isekai de Nishuume Play wo Mankitsuchuu
そのおっさん、異世界で二周目プレイを満喫中
Sono Ossan, Isekai de Nishuume Play o Mankitsu-chuu
Isekai de Nishuume Play o Mankitsuchuu
The Old Man Who Got a Second Round in Another World
Старик, который получил второй шанс в другом мире
items.synopsis: Yuuya is a middle aged adventurer without talent. As hardworking as he is, he spends his days garnering little reward. One day, his memories of being a corporate slave return and he realizes that he has reincarnated into a world of the video game he had been obsessed with. As a bonus for resetting his level, his stats rise and the limits increase to the maximum. As a result, his life receives a turnaround. Using his knowledge of the game as well as his 10 years of experience as an adventurer, he will obtain all that he grasps with the skills he has forged. At last, in his third life, the time has come for the old man to be rewarded for his efforts.

items.title: The Beloved Daughter of a Crime Family Was Reincarnated as the Daughter of a Gangster in an Otome Game
alt_titles: Akutou Ikka no Mana Musume, Tensei Saki mo Otome Game no Gokudou Reijou deshita
悪党一家の愛娘、転生先も乙女ゲームの極道令嬢でした。
悪党一家の愛娘、転生先も乙女ゲームの極道令嬢でした。　～最上級ランクの悪役さま、その溺愛は不要です！～@COMIC
Akutou Ikka no Mana Musume, Tensei Saki mo Otome Game no Gokudou Reijou deshita: Saijoukyuu Rank no Akuyaku-sama, Sono Dekiai wa Fuyou desu! @COMIC
The Beloved Daughter of a Crime Family Was Reincarnated as the Daughter of a Gangster in an Otome Game: Highest-Ranking Villain, That Doting Is Unnecessary!
Reincarnated in a Mafia Dating Sim
Reincarnated in a Mafia Dating Sim: A Yakuza Heiress Becomes the Top-Ranked Villain's Romantic Target!
บุตรสาวตระกูลวายร้ายมาเกิดใหม่เป็นคุณหนูมาเฟียในเกมจีบหนุ่ม
บุตรสาวตระกูลวายร้ายมาเกิดใหม่เป็นคุณหนูมาเฟียในเกมจีบหนุ่ม ~ท่านตัวร้ายระดับสูงสุดคะ ช่วยอย่าหลงรักจนไม่ลืมหูลืมตาจะได้มั้ยคะ!~ @COMIC
악당 일가의 애지중지 딸, 전생해서도 여성향 게임의 조폭 영애였습니다
黑手党一家的爱女、转生后依旧成为了乙女游戏中的黑帮大小姐
Cháu gái cưng của xã hội đen, bỗng tái sinh thành Cô con gái yêu dấu của một gia đình tội phạm trong thế giới trò chơi Otome. ~Nhân vật phản diện cấp cao nhất, tôi không cần thứ tình cảm đó!
items.synopsis: After her sudden death at the hands of an assassin, the former granddaughter of a Yakuza boss reincarnates into an otome game as the heroine. The game is, of course, set in the time of early European mafia (but with magic and other special abilities somehow)—specifically a kingdom where the royal family is supported behind the scenes by five major crime families! "Please God, whyyy, I only wanted to life a normal life!"

items.title: Sono Dekiai ni wa Uso ga Aru
alt_titles: There's a Lie in This Infatuation
その溺愛にはウソがある。
items.synopsis:
From the powerful duo behind *Marika-chan and Her Gentle Love Slave*, comes a long-awaited new series!  
  
Inukai Hagumi had the encounter of her dreams with a handsome customer at the café where she works. However, is this dream too good to be true?  
  
This is a 2-part one-shot.

items.title: Aiming For Maximal Volume in the Apocalypse
alt_titles: 終末世界でレベルカンストを狙います
Aiming for Maximal Level in a Post-Apocalyptic World
末日重生后我疯狂升级
The Privilege of the Second Life is Power Leveling
items.synopsis: In the five years of the last days, the earth became purgatory. The poisonous sister in her body was killed by Warcraft, but Chen Yan had no counterattack. But when he woke up again, he found that he was reborn before the end, and he had an ability! The system came and told him how to save his sister. But the premise is that he must upgrade crazy to stop the end.

items.title: Koppa Mai Chiru - Sono Koro ni
alt_titles: 木っ端舞い散る　その頃に
items.synopsis:
Maebara Kei Gets a Job!

In the 13th year of the Heisei era, in the Tokyo Metropolitan Area, Coastal Region. Due to the prolonged economic recession, the police force has weakened, and the growing number of disillusioned youth turning to loosely organized criminal gangs has led to a drastic decline in public peace... Amidst all this, Maebara Kei begins working at the ward office. Can he become a respectable public servant...?

(Source: Young Champion)

items.title: Banoten!
alt_titles: その場のテンションで！
items.synopsis: When Chinatsu joined the student council, she found it wasn't nearly as cool as she had expected. The president just slept all the time, and the vice president just did paperwork. There was no fighting evil, no sex appeal… just normal school stuff. It's up to Chinatsu to liven things up!

items.title: Legend of the Sun Knight
alt_titles: พลิกตำนานเทพอัศวิน
items.synopsis: The Sun Knight is a man who has shining golden hair, sky blue eyes, a compassionate nature, and a brilliant smile. He is the spokesperson for the God of Light, the captain of the Twelve Holy Knights, and (some say) the man closest to perfection. Beneath the veneer of the Sun Knight, however, lies a very different sort of character…

items.title: Uchi no Yome wa Jibun no Koto shika Kangaenai!!
alt_titles: My Wife is Only Thinking about Herself!!
My Wife is Only Thinking about Myself!!
ウチの嫁は自分のことしか考えない!!
¡Mi esposa solo piensa en sí misma!
items.synopsis:
"My reason for liking you? It's because of money."  
A bride who is only thinking about herself…  
But, I really like someone like you.  
….that, kind of manga.

items.title: That Inferior Knight, Level 999
items.synopsis:
His father is a sage and his mother is a martial artist...

Yuan is a boy whose parents are the strongest humans in this world and they raised him making him believe he's "weak". However, he can pulverize giant rocks with a flick of his finger and he hunts and eats dragons, believing they're just "lizards". His daily life isn't normal at all!!

If you're raised by the strongest, it's only natural that you're going to be the strongest too. This is the story of a peerless boy who knows nothing of the world but he's about to shake it!!

(Source: Manga UP! Global)

___
**Links:**
* Web Novel (JP): [syosetu](https://ncode.syosetu.com/n0774fa/)

items.title: I'm Not a Villainess!! Just Because I Can Control Darkness, Doesn't Mean I'm a Villain
alt_titles: 私は悪役令嬢なんかじゃないっ!! 闇使いだからって必ずしも悪役だと思うなよ
Watashi wa Akuyaku Reijou nanka ja nai!!: Yami Tsukai dakaratte Kanarazushimo Akuyaku da to Omou na yo
Je ne suis pas une méchante!! Juste parce que je peux contrôler les ténèbres, ça ne veut pas dire que je suis une mauvaise personne!
Eu não sou uma vilã!! Só porque eu posso controlar a escuridão, não significa que eu sou uma pessoa ruim!
¡¡No soy una villana!! ¡Solo porque pueda controlar la oscuridad, no significa que sea una mala persona!
人家才不是惡役千金呢！
나는 악역영애가 아니야!! 어둠마법사라고 해서 반드시 악역이라고 생각하지마
I'm Not a Villainess!! Just Because I Can Control Darkness Doesn't Mean I'm a Bad Person!
Watashi wa Akuyaku Reijou nanka ja nai!!: Yami Tsukai dakara tte Kanarazu shi mo Akuyaku da to Omouna yo
items.synopsis:
Due to a certain incident, Sakura's life ended abruptly. To think her life amounted to this…

Though depressed for a brief moment, she soon realized she'd reincarnated into the world of a novel she once read! Even so, the person she reincarnated as was none other than the villainess, Claudia.

Under the divine protection of the Dark Spirit King, she finds herself despised by those around her, and, in the end, she's fated to meet a tragic death?! No way in hell she'll let both her last life *and* this one meet a Bad End! But even when she tries to take action to somehow change her fate…?

The long awaited manga adaptation of a unique villainess' fantasy tale!

---

- [Official Manga Website](http://www.regina-books.com/manga/content/239)  
- Japanese Light Novel: [Bookwalker](https://bookwalker.jp/series/151311/), [Amazon.co.jp](https://www.amazon.co.jp/%E7%A7%81%E3%81%AF%E6%82%AA%E5%BD%B9%E4%BB%A4%E5%AC%A2%E3%81%AA%E3%82%93%E3%81%8B%E3%81%98%E3%82%83%E3%81%AA%E3%81%84%E3%81%A3-%E9%97%87%E4%BD%BF%E3%81%84%E3%81%A0%E3%81%8B%E3%82%89%E3%81%A3%E3%81%A6%E5%BF%85%E3%81%9A%E3%81%97%E3%82%82%E6%82%AA%E5%BD%B9%E3%81%A0%E3%81%A8%E6%80%9D%E3%81%86%E3%81%AA%E3%82%88-%E3%83%AC%E3%82%B8%E3%83%BC%E3%83%8A%E3%83%96%E3%83%83%E3%82%AF%E3%82%B9-%E9%9F%B3%E7%84%A1-%E7%A0%82%E6%9C%88/dp/4434242202)

items.title: Don't Love Me With That Face
items.synopsis: Nora, who works as a maid in a wealthy estate, is in a secret love affair with the Young Master Makoto. But one day, Makoto gets in a sudden car accident and dies. While Nora is overcome with grief, Makoto’s twin brother, Nozomu—who had been adopted out as a child—suddenly shows up in front of her. “Shall I become Makoto for you?” The same face. A different person. A heart wrenching love story.

items.title: Sono Munou, Jitsu wa Sekai Saikyou no Mahoutsukai ~Munou to Sagesumare, Kizokuka kara Oidasareta ga, Gift "Tenseisha" ga Kakusei shite Zense no Nouryoku ga Yomigaetta~
alt_titles: その無能、実は世界最強の魔法使い　〜無能と蔑まれ、貴族家から追い出されたが、ギフト《転生者》が覚醒して前世の能力が蘇った〜

That Incompetent is Actually the World's Strongest Wizard: He was Scorned as Incompetent and Kicked out of His Aristocratic Family, but His Gift of "Reincarnation" Awakened and Brought Back the Abilities of His Previous Life
items.synopsis:
Alma, the third son of an aristocratic family who could not receive the Gift that should have been given by God, is despised as incompetent from his parents' home and is expelled from the house. However, in reality, Alma was given a special Gift - He regained the abilities of the previous life! With the Gift [Reincarnation], he becomes the strongest wizard in the world! Alma, who devoted all of his first life to the quest for magic, seeks a "happy second life" with the magic of his previous life!
___
[Web Novel](https://ncode.syosetu.com/n3823gm/)  (JP)

items.title: Terminus
items.synopsis: The end of the line.

items.title: Dois Sol
items.synopsis:
Nonaga Hiromasa is an up and coming soccer coach who has made a name for himself for bringing multiple teams from literally nothing to the top in the country. What’s even more impressive is that he just entered high school! He was recruited into his current high school as the new soccer coach, and his observation skills and ability to predict the opponents’ movement make his sole presence enough to win games.  
  
The fact that Hiromasa is going to be coaching at the high school has many top soccer players flocking to this school, but none stand out more to him than Sakamichi Kappo. Not only can Kappo score a goal from half field with his powerful kick, but his ball control is second to none. Initially, Kappo didn’t want to play on a team because he thought no one understood “his soccer style,” but when Hiromasa was able to understand it, Kappo decideds to play for the team. Will the brilliant coach and the talented player be able to take the high school soccer world by storm?

items.title: Sono Ki De Ite Yo
alt_titles: Cứ Để Lòng Mình Rung Động
items.synopsis:
The latest work from Yamada, creator of Tashiro-kun, Kimi tte Yatsu wa, featured in onBLUE vol.72, is finally available digitally!
A short but sweet 11-page high school BL story unfolds as class rep Nanoka gets roped into asking the stunning new transfer student, Ayami, a series of flirty questions at the insistence of his classmates. But when Nanoka finally works up the nerve, Ayami fixes him with an intense gaze and smirks—
"A class rep with that many piercings? That’s pretty willful, huh?"
A heart-throbbing love story between an unintentional flirt and an enchanting transfer student!

items.title: Kimi wo Mae ni Shitara Ore wa Mou...
alt_titles: 君を前にしたら俺はもうっ…
君を前にしたら俺はもうっ… 肉食派男子の純情な欲情
Kimi wo Mae ni Shitara Ore wa Mou... Nikushokuha Danshi no Junjou na Yokujou
Chàng trai ngây thơ thèm thịt gái
Cuando estás delante solo pienso en empotrarte. La dulce pasión de un joven insaciable
널 앞에 두자니 더 이상은…~육식남의 순정과 욕정~
items.synopsis:
“I’m sorry. If you don’t like it, you should run away now.”

Nono quit her job after breaking up with her superior at her previous workplace. On the first day of her new job, she got the chief builder’s son, Keita, injured. Because of Keita’s leg injury, Nono started helping him out.

Despite her first impression of his body size and how he looked, Nono was touched by Keita’s friendly smile and kindness, and was becoming more and more attracted to him. But why does it seem like Keita knew Nono before their first meeting…?!

items.title: Elixir of the Sun
alt_titles: ผู้ครอบครองดวงอาทิตย์
ดวงใจจักรพรรดิ
Elixir of the Sun: Side Story
Elixir of the Sun - Puffyfuffy Translation
items.synopsis:
Bayan is an outcast amongst the Siyo, a people who have healing powers. Considered worthless because she doesn’t have the ability to heal others, Bayan is sent to the court of Dhan, the Great Sun Emperor, who is cursed with unrelenting bloodlust and slaughters his concubines mercilessly. It seems that Bayan’s fate is sealed the moment she reaches the emperor’s palace and Dhan is fated to suffer from madness forever… But together, Bayan and Dhan just might be able to change each other’s destiny.

---
**Original Novel:** [KakaoPage](https://page.kakao.com/content/50741989), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/novel/detail.series?productNo=3544305)

**Original Webtoon:** [Daum](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%ED%83%9C%EC%96%91%EC%9D%98-%EC%A3%BC%EC%9D%B8/2519), [KakaoPage](https://page.kakao.com/content/55872683)

* [Vietnamese / Tiếng Việt](https://pops.tv/comics/chu-nhan-cua-mat-troi-614daed9556bc80057f0a145)

items.title: Solo Second Playthrough - Overpowered and Breaking Game Balance
alt_titles: 俺だけ2周目ガチ勢～強すぎてゲームバランスを破壊した～
The Only New Game+ Hardcore Gamer ~I'm So Overpowered, I Shattered the Game's Balance~
Ore Dake 2-Shuume Gachizei - Tsuyo Sugite Game Balance wo Hakai Shita
items.synopsis: His second life is built on knowledge and skill! Former pro-gamer Itsuki, who had been working as a Vtuber to hide his former flameout, is attacked by a nasty fan and accidentally loses consciousness. When he wakes up, he finds himself in the world of 10 years ago, right after the launch of the extremely popular VRMMO “Metasense”! Here, he doesn't have to hide his past. With second-hand knowledge and play skills, it's a cinch to make it as a gamer and distributor! I stand at the top of ...... metasense!

items.title: That Beauty Is a Tramp
alt_titles: その美人（オトコ）ふしだらにつき
その美人ふしだらにつき
items.synopsis: Nagi and Aran, an extremely beautiful male model, became lovers by contract. Although she hates men, through their dates and exciting physical relations, as if they were real lovers, Nagi actually falls in love with Aran. Feeling the urge to touch him more, she unintentionally asks him to go out with her without a contract. Aran is surprised! A limited-time love lesson between a beautiful, egotistical model and a boyish girl with a determined spirit begins!

items.title: A True Doctor
alt_titles: คุณหมอชเวแทซู
items.synopsis:
"The Gates of Hell"—that’s what they call the doors to the surgical ward of Yeonseong Hospital. And I’m Taesoo Choi, one of the many interns seen as nothing more than tin can robots by some of the senior doctors. To escape this chaos, I went hiking, where I found the nearly lifeless body of the esteemed surgeon Dr. Kauffrene. Despite my efforts, it was too late to save him, but somehow I gained all his medical knowledge! Now my life is changing in ways I never expected, but is this a blessing… or a curse?

---

- [Original Webtoon <Webtoon kakao>](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%EB%8B%A5%ED%84%B0-%EC%B5%9C%ED%83%9C%EC%88%98/2310)

---

- [Official Traditional Chinese Translation](https://tw.kakaowebtoon.com/content/%E7%A5%9E%E9%86%AB%E5%B4%94%E6%B3%B0%E7%A7%80/123)

- [Official Japanese Translation](https://piccoma.com/web/product/70671)

- [Official Thai Translation](https://th.kakaowebtoon.com/content/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B8%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%AB%E0%B8%A1%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%8A%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%A7%E0%B9%81%E0%B8%97%E0%B8%8B%E0%B8%B9/214)

items.title: Just a Few Words
items.synopsis: A married couple's love has cooled off, but just a few words might just change everything. (Source: Manga Updates)

items.title: Ao Haru Ride
items.synopsis:
She didn’t want to fall in love, but then she met a boy she was interested in…

Special oneshot by Sakisaka Io, celebrating "Bessatsu Margaret" 50th anniversary since launch.

items.title: Mina Soko Nite
alt_titles: because the girls are all childish
At the Bottom of the Water
items.synopsis:
In this town's lake, a man-eating mermaid is said to have been sunk to the bottom.

Today, the mermaid still wanders the town in search of a companion, stirring up the restless hearts of the people.

A modern day tale of foolish girls who can't survive in clear water.

items.title: Emperor of Solo Play
items.synopsis:
Betrayed by his guild and defeated by a top player, Hyrkan loses everything. Before he can get revenge, a fatal accident ends his life — only for him to wake up years in the past, back at the start of Warlord. 

Now, with his memories intact, he’s determined to rise to the top alone. But in a game where power means everything, can he truly survive without any allies? 

The Emperor of Solo Play is back, and this time, he’s playing by his own rules.
